name: aoti-debug
tagline: Diagnoses PyTorch AOTInductor (AOTI) compile/load errors: device mismatches, segfaults, and CUDA illegal-memory-access crashes.
verdict: Narrow, well-organized debugging guide with concrete env-var flags, clear error-pattern routing, and no internal contradictions. No security concerns of any kind. Only gap: no version field or changelog, so consumers can't tell if it changed since last trusted.

highlights.summary: No version field, changelog heading, or dated revision notes anywhere in the skill.
